description: Structured JSON format for LLM responses controlling Serum 2 parameters

preset_name.description: Human-readable name for the generated preset

description.description: Brief description of the sound character and intended use
description.example: Deep, aggressive wobble bass with filter modulation perfect for dubstep drops

parameter_changes.description: Parameter indices and their normalized values (0.0-1.0)

critical_changes.description: Key parameters with human-readable names for clarity

categories_affected.description: List of parameter categories being modified

example.reason: Primary wobble control for bass movement

genre_tags.description: Musical genres this preset works well with

max_patch_commands.description: Direct Max for Live commands to execute the preset

usage_guidelines.parameter_values: All parameter values must be normalized between 0.0 and 1.0
usage_guidelines.parameter_indices: Use 1-based indexing (1, 2, 3...) matching Serum 2's internal structure
usage_guidelines.critical_parameters: Always include critical_changes for transparency and debugging
usage_guidelines.automation_focus: Identify 1-3 key parameters for real-time control/modulation
usage_guidelines.preset_naming: Use descriptive names that convey sound character and musical context

example_preset.description: Classic acid house lead with resonant filter sweep and envelope control

automation_targets.reason: Primary cutoff sweep for acid character
